description: Analysis enhancement for TR126 critical review

interpretation.interaction_meaning: The interaction is significant — the effect of backend choice depends on model scale. This formally validates the scale crossover observation.

phase2_baseline.status: WORKS — all compiled decode measurements succeed

phase3.status: CRASHES — 100% failure rate on compiled decode

finding.summary: CUDA graph compiled decode is LENGTH-DEPENDENT, not absolute. It works at max_new_tokens=64 (Phase 2 baseline, 1,890 successful measurements) but crashes at max_new_tokens=128 (Phase 3, 100% crash rate). The CUDA graph captures tensor shapes for the initial KV-cache state; longer generation means more shape mutations before graph replay, increasing the probability of shape mismatch.
